items.headline: RBI maintains repo rate at 5.25%, revises FY27 GDP growth downwards and inflation upwards
items.summary: The RBI Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) unanimously decided to maintain the repo rate at 5.25% with a neutral stance. However, it revised the FY27 GDP growth forecast downwards to 6.6% from 6.9% and increased the FY27 inflation projection to 5.1% from 4.6%, citing external risks, commodity price shocks, and geopolitical tensions, prioritizing stability.

items.headline: India's retail inflation hits 15-month high in May; forecasts suggest further rise
items.summary: India's retail inflation (CPI) rose to a 15-month high of 3.93% in May 2026, up from 3.48% in April. Food inflation for May stood at 4.78%. Goldman Sachs forecasts June CPI at 4.4%. Prabhudas Lilladher warns of high probability of inflation exceeding RBI's 6% upper band in H2 FY27 due to El Niño and supply-chain disruptions.

items.headline: Government and RBI to implement measures to attract foreign capital, prepared for monsoon
items.summary: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman stated that the government and RBI would implement additional measures to attract foreign capital into India, emphasizing continuous reforms for long-term economic growth. She also noted the government's preparedness for a 'not-so-good monsoon scenario'.

items.headline: US-Iran peace deal announced, set to reopen Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: President Donald Trump announced a peace deal between the US and Iran, expected to be formalized soon, which will de-escalate geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

items.headline: Crude oil prices drop sharply by over 4% post US-Iran peace deal
items.summary: Following the US-Iran peace deal announcement, global crude oil prices, specifically Brent crude, dropped sharply by over 4%, reaching their lowest levels since March and easing inflation concerns.

items.headline: Indian Rupee surges to highest level since May 8
items.summary: The Indian Rupee surged to its highest level since May 8, opening at 94.68 per US dollar on Monday, reacting positively to global developments.

items.headline: Asian markets react positively to global news; US markets also up
items.summary: Asian markets responded positively to the global news, with Japan's Nikkei gaining 5.11% and South Korea's KOSPI up 5.46% on Monday. US markets also closed in positive territory on Friday.

items.headline: Investors to monitor US Fed FOMC meeting for interest rate cues
items.summary: Investors will closely monitor the US Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting scheduled for June 16-17, 2026, for indications on interest rate policy, especially given recent resilient US jobs data.

items.headline: Q4 FY26 earnings season continues, major companies to report
items.summary: The Q4 FY26 earnings season is continuing, with several large-cap and PSU companies expected to announce results this week.

items.headline: LIC and LG Electronics India among key companies reporting Q4 FY26 earnings this week
items.summary: Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC) and LG Electronics India are among the key companies scheduled to release their quarterly earnings this week, attracting investor attention.

items.headline: Indian corporates achieve robust 13.9% PAT growth in Q4 FY26: Emkay Global
items.summary: Emkay Global's Q4 FY26 earnings report indicates that Indian corporates achieved a robust 13.9% year-on-year profit after tax (PAT) growth, supported by strong revenue expansion across various sectors.

items.headline: Indian markets see broad-based buying interest, most sectoral indices higher
items.summary: Indian markets witnessed broad-based buying interest on Monday, with most sectoral indices trading higher in early trade.

items.headline: Nifty Auto, FMCG, IT, Metal gain over 1%; Nifty Pharma in red
items.summary: Nifty Auto, Nifty FMCG, Nifty IT, and Nifty Metal all registered gains of over 1% in Monday's early trade, while Nifty Pharma was the only sectoral index in the red, declining by 0.26%.

items.headline: Private banks, consumption, auto, realty drive market rally
items.summary: Private banks, consumption-linked sectors, auto, and realty sectors were identified as key drivers of the market rally.

items.headline: Aviation, oil refining, real estate, financial services, shipping, infra to benefit from US-Iran peace deal
items.summary: Aviation, oil refining, real estate, financial services, shipping, and infrastructure sectors are specifically identified as beneficiaries of the US-Iran peace deal due to reduced crude oil prices and improved global trade routes.

items.headline: RBI amends FEMA regulations, replaces NCLT with 'Competent Authority' for cross-border merger approvals
items.summary: The RBI amended the Foreign Exchange Management (Cross Border Merger) Regulations, 2018, replacing the fixed reference to the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) with 'Competent Authority' for merger approvals, thereby decoupling its foreign exchange compliance framework from a single tribunal.

items.headline: JSW Energy to acquire 100% stake in Maruti Clean Coal and Power
items.summary: JSW Energy has entered a definitive agreement to acquire a 100% stake in Maruti Clean Coal and Power.

items.headline: NLC India emerges as preferred bidder for critical mineral block in Telangana
items.summary: NLC India has emerged as the preferred bidder for a critical mineral block located in Telangana.

items.headline: Meesho acquired Kirana Club for ₹202 crore
items.summary: Meesho acquired Kirana Club for ₹202 crore.

items.headline: Aether Energy board approves raising ₹2500 crore via QIP and FCCBs
items.summary: Aether Energy's board approved raising ₹2500 crore, with ₹1500 crore via Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) and ₹1000 crore through Foreign Currency Convertible Bonds (FCCBs).

items.headline: India's M&A market expected to remain strong in 2026
items.summary: India's M&A market is anticipated to remain strong in 2026, with a growing trend towards strategic acquisitions and consolidation within fragmented sectors.

items.headline: Shriram Finance, IndiGo, Bajaj Finance, L&T, TMPV among top Nifty gainers
items.summary: Shriram Finance, Interglobe Aviation (IndiGo), Bajaj Finance, Larsen & Toubro (L&T), and TMPV were among the top Nifty gainers in Monday's early trade.

items.headline: ONGC, Cipla, Apollo Hospitals among top Nifty losers
items.summary: ONGC, Cipla, and Apollo Hospitals were observed as top Nifty losers in Monday's early trade.

items.headline: LIC, GAIL, Tata Steel, RCF, LG Electronics India in focus for upcoming week
items.summary: LIC, GAIL, Tata Steel, Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers (RCF), and LG Electronics India are stocks to watch for the upcoming week due to impending earnings announcements and company-specific news.

items.headline: MRPL, IndiGo, Godrej Properties, L&T Finance, SCI, HPCL surge on US-Iran peace deal
items.summary: MRPL (+5.80%), Interglobe Aviation (IndiGo) (+4.62%), Godrej Properties (+5.81%), L&T Finance (+6.41%), Shipping Corporation of India (SCI) (+3.99%), and HPCL (+3.54%) saw significant gains, benefiting directly from the US-Iran peace deal.

items.headline: Power Grid Corporation of India wins inter-state transmission project
items.summary: Power Grid Corporation of India was the successful bidder for an inter-state transmission system project.

items.headline: Nestle India denies claims of infestation in MAGGI noodles
items.summary: Nestle India issued a denial regarding claims of infestation found in its MAGGI noodles product.
